description: Keeps the first N and last M messages from a conversation, removing the middle. System messages are always preserved regardless of counts. Useful for managing context length while retaining initial context and recent messages.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: Array of message objects to trim

inputs.name: keep_first
inputs.description: Number of non-system messages to keep from the start

inputs.name: keep_last
inputs.description: Number of messages to keep from the end

outputs.name: messages
outputs.description: Array of messages with middle removed, system messages preserved

outputs.name: removed_count
outputs.description: Number of messages that were removed
